_publications._publicationTitle: Optical coherence tomography of the macular ganglion cell layer in children with neurofibromatosis type 1 is a useful tool in the assessment for optic pathway gliomas.

_contextSnippet: VFI measurements in 55 eyes (37%) from 36 patients...VFI in 39% of eyes without symptomatic OPG and in 31% eyes with OPG
details: VFI measurements were obtained in only 55 eyes (37%) from 36 patients, with success rates of 39% in eyes without symptomatic OPG and 31% in eyes with OPG
